action.reasoning: Observation: iter_17 best mean_r2=0.2445 with linear model (200k) and full humidity override. New 2M linear model estimated val mean_r2=0.235. Temperature/radiation/precipitation R² are decent but humidity override gives zero contribution. Analysis: overriding only low‑variance dims (threshold) while keeping predictions for higher‑variance humidity dims could yield positive R² and boost overall mean_r2. Training linear model on larger sample (5M) may improve coefficients. Decision: write script to compute per‑dim variance, train Ridge on 5M samples, find best override threshold, save config, update predict.py accordingly. Run now, submit eval next iteration.
